query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: A bird in flight appears as a small dark silhouette in the lower right corner of a gray sky, with a bright circular light source visible as a diffuse disc in the upper left corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A bird in flight appears as a small dark silhouette in the lower right corner of a gray sky rendered in heavily muted, washed-out tones with low contrast and weak tonal separation, while a bright circular light source appears as a diffuse disc in the upper left corner, contributing to a flat and oppressive atmospheric effect.
